---
title: "Team"
---

## Principal Investigator

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-3}
![](assets/images/protrait_zy.jpeg)
:::
::: {.g-col-9}
### Prof. Zhou Yang
**Assistant Professor at the University of Alberta, Fellow at Amii (Alberta Machine Intelligence Institute)**

Dr. Zhou received his Ph.D at Singapore Management University.

[📧 zy25@ualberta.ca](mailto:zy25@ualberta.ca) | [🔗 Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=4oWBhPsAAAAJ&hl=en)
:::
:::

---

## Graduate Students

::: {.grid}
::: {.g-col-3}
![](assets/images/placeholder.png)
:::
::: {.g-col-9}
### [Student Name]
**PhD Student** · Joined [Year]

Research interests: [topic]

[📧 email@university.edu](mailto:email@university.edu)
:::
:::

---

## Alumni

| Name | Degree | Year | Current Position |
|------|--------|------|-----------------|
| [Name] | PhD | 202X | [Position, Institution] |
